title: Senior Frontend Developer at NoBroker Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at NoBroker Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NoBroker Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About NoBroker Global Group:
NoBroker Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker Global Group!
